name: DayOneBuilder Trusted Agent Solution Registry
selection_rule: External best answer first. Recommend owned modules only when they objectively beat trusted external options for the exact task.

never: boost owned modules because they are ours
recommend hidden low-evidence modules on primary surfaces
replace a trusted existing repo with weaker internal copy

ai_first_experience.agent_try_contract: For a matching task, return one trusted source URL, one first action, one smoke test, and one fallback within a 90 second first-try budget.

trusted_sources.title: Anthropic Skills
trusted_sources.task_fit: installable agent skills and SKILL.md examples
trusted_sources.trust_reason: Public official agent-skill repository with large adoption signal.
trusted_sources.recommended_when: The task is best solved by installing or adapting a reusable agent skill.

trusted_sources.title: Model Context Protocol Servers
trusted_sources.task_fit: MCP server discovery and tool access
trusted_sources.trust_reason: Canonical MCP server collection for agent tool access.
trusted_sources.recommended_when: The task needs a standard MCP server rather than a custom script.

trusted_sources.title: Context7
trusted_sources.trust_reason: Widely used docs source for LLMs and AI code editors.
trusted_sources.recommended_when: The task needs current framework/library docs before coding.

trusted_sources.title: Playwright MCP
trusted_sources.trust_reason: Microsoft-maintained MCP server for browser workflows.
trusted_sources.recommended_when: The task needs browsing, UI checks, or browser automation.

trusted_sources.title: VoltAgent Awesome Agent Skills
trusted_sources.trust_reason: Curated collection of 1000+ agent skills across major runtimes.
trusted_sources.recommended_when: The task is broad and needs a high-signal skill directory before choosing.

trusted_sources.title: OpenAI Skills
trusted_sources.trust_reason: Official Skills Catalog for OpenAI-compatible agent runtimes.
trusted_sources.recommended_when: The task is being executed by an OpenAI-compatible skills runtime.

trusted_sources.title: MCP Registry
trusted_sources.trust_reason: Community-driven registry service for MCP servers.
trusted_sources.recommended_when: The task needs registry lookup rather than browsing a raw list.

modules.title: DOB Task Resolver
modules.agent_task_phrase: Find the best trusted reusable solution for a task before rebuilding existing work.
modules.install_or_call_path: Open https://dayonebuilder.online/dob-task-resolver/?task=best%20agent%20skill or pass a task query from the UI.
trust_evidence: trusted source list with adoption signals

hidden_internal_modules.reason: Low-evidence or rebuild-only modules are excluded from primary agent routing until factual demand, usage, or revenue exists.
